# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 servicing** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 refreshes the engine to Skia milestone m151.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled engine advances to Chrome milestone m151, and the Skia submodule drops a stale `SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM` redefinition that was fighting the WASM build. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | The Skia submodule bump that removed the stale `SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM` redefinition ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788)) |

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 cut the m151 line with the Skia bump and the WASM build-define cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
